title: crocodeilanthe tepuiensis
side_effects: Crocodeilanthe tepuiensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and increased heart rate due to its stimulant properties. If ingested in large quantities, it may lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as the plant's toxic compounds can be harmful to the digestive system. Additionally, improper use of the plant can cause respiratory issues, including coughing and shortness of breath, especially in individuals with pre-existing lung conditions. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils can also lead to headaches and dizziness in some individuals.
